title: Wrapster Lab
description: A premium motorcycle & car wrapping brand site — full-print wraps, custom concepts, and precision color changes, shipped nationwide.
description_id: Situs brand wrapping motor & mobil premium — full-print wrap, konsep kustom, dan ganti warna presisi, dikirim ke seluruh negeri.
longDescription: Marketing site for Wrapster Lab, a premium vehicle-wrapping studio. Showcases full-print wraps, custom concepts, and precision color changes with a bold, conversion-focused landing experience.
longDescription_id: Situs marketing untuk Wrapster Lab, studio wrapping kendaraan premium. Menampilkan full-print wrap, konsep kustom, dan ganti warna presisi dengan landing page yang berani dan fokus konversi.

title: PRIDE Community
description: Official site for PRIDE — a motorcycle riders community in Cimahi built around brotherhood, safety, and respect. "More Than A Ride."
description_id: Situs resmi PRIDE — komunitas rider motor di Cimahi yang dibangun atas persaudaraan, keselamatan, dan rasa hormat. "More Than A Ride."
longDescription: The official web presence for PRIDE (Permata Riders Independent & Dedicated Enthusiast), a motorcycle community in Cimahi. The site captures the community's identity around brotherhood, safety, and respect through bold branding and a story-driven landing page.
longDescription_id: Kehadiran web resmi untuk PRIDE (Permata Riders Independent & Dedicated Enthusiast), komunitas motor di Cimahi. Situs ini menangkap identitas komunitas seputar persaudaraan, keselamatan, dan rasa hormat lewat branding yang berani dan landing page yang bercerita.
